userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

groupIds.description: The group ids for the private endpoint resource.

privateLinkServiceConnectionState.description: A collection of information about the state of the connection between service consumer and provider.

id.description: The Azure identifier for private endpoint.

status.description: Indicates whether the connection has been Approved/Rejected/Removed by the owner of the service.

description.description: The reason for approval/rejection of the connection.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

properties.description: The properties of a capability resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

publisher.description: String of the Publisher that this Capability extends.

targetType.description: String of the Target Type that this Capability extends.

parametersSchema.description: URL to retrieve JSON schema of the Capability parameters.

urn.description: String of the URN for this Capability Type.

provisioningState.description: Resource provisioning state. Not currently in use because resource is created synchronously.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given scenario resource.

createdFrom.description: Resource ID of the template version this scenario was created from (optional).

description.description: Description of what this scenario does (optional).

actions.description: Array of actions that define the scenario's orchestration.

recommendation.description: The recommendation information for this scenario.

actionId.description: Identifier of the action and version (e.g., "microsoft-compute-shutdown/1.0").

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does.

duration.description: ISO 8601 duration for how long the action runs (e.g., PT30M for 30 minutes). Supports template macro syntax (%%\{parameters.\<name\>\}%%).

runAfter.description: Action dependencies that control when this action starts.

waitBefore.description: ISO 8601 duration to wait before action starts (e.g., PT30S for 30 seconds). Supports template macro syntax.

timeout.description: ISO 8601 duration for maximum action execution time. Supports template macro syntax.

externalResource.description: External resource reference for the action.

behavior.description: Defines how multiple dependencies are evaluated.

name.description: Name of the action this depends on.

onActionLifecycle.description: The lifecycle state of the dependency action that triggers this action to start.

resourceId.description: The resource ID of the external resource.

evaluationRunAt.description: The UTC time when the recommendation was evaluated.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

scenarioId.description: Resource ID of the scenario this configuration applies to.

parameters.description: Runtime parameter values for the scenario. Keys must match parameter names defined in the scenario.

exclusions.description: Exclusion criteria for protecting resources from fault injection.

provisioningState.description: Most recent provisioning state for the given scenario resource.

filters.description: Filter criteria used to constrain which discovered resources participate in fault injection.

resources.description: Array of specific resource IDs to exclude from fault injection.

tags.description: Array of tag key-value pairs. Resources with matching tags are excluded.

types.description: Array of resource types. All resources of these types are excluded.

locations.description:
Array of Azure location strings. Only resources in these locations are included.

Null or omitted means all locations (no filter). Empty array means include nothing.

zones.description:
Array of availability zone identifiers ("1", "2", "3", "zone-redundant").
Only resources whose zones intersect this list are included.

Null or omitted means all zones (including non-zonal). Empty array means include nothing.

Mutually exclusive with `physicalZones` — set one or the other, not both.

physicalZones.description:
Array of physical availability zone identifiers in `{region}-az{N}` format
(e.g., `"westus2-az1"`). Only resources in the corresponding logical zone
for each subscription are included.

At execution time, each physical zone is resolved to per-subscription
logical zones via the Azure locations API. The resolved mapping is surfaced
on the scenario run response (`zoneResolution`).

Null or omitted means physical zone targeting is not used.
Only one physical zone is supported in preview.

Mutually exclusive with `zones` — set one or the other, not both.

kind.description: String of the kind of the resource's action type (continuous or discrete).

properties.description: The properties of the discovered resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

namespace.description: The namespace of the discovered resource.

resourceName.description: The name of the discovered resource.

resourceType.description: The resource type of the discovered resource.

fullyQualifiedIdentifier.description: The fully qualified identifier of the discovered resource.

discoveredAt.description: The date and time when the resource was discovered.

scope.description: The scope of the discovered resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

managedIdentityPrincipalId.description: The principal id for the managed identity used for the run.

resources.description: All resources discovered for the scenario run.

errors.description: System or infrastructure errors encountered during the scenario run.

executionErrors.description: Business errors from fault injection — permission and resource state issues.

startTime.description: When the scenario run was started.

endTime.description: When the scenario run was completed.

zoneResolution.description:
Zone resolution information. Present when the scenario configuration
used physical zone targeting (`physicalZones`). Contains the mode,
requested physical zones, and per-subscription logical zone mappings.

errorCode.description: The error code identifying the type of system error.

errorMessage.description: A human-readable description of the system error.

errorCode.description: Error code for internal server errors.

errorMessage.description: Error message for internal server errors.

permission.description: Any permission errors associated with the scenario run.

resource.description: Any resource state errors associated with the scenario run.

resourceId.description: The resource id for the affected resource.
The resource id for the affected resource.

resources.description: The resources associated with the specified action.

actionUrn.description: The urn for the given chaos action.

mode.description:
The zone targeting mode used for this run.
`logical` — customer specified logical zone identifiers directly.
`physical` — customer specified physical zone identifiers; the system
resolved them to per-subscription logical zones at execution time.

requestedPhysicalZones.description:
The physical zone identifiers requested by the customer in the
scenario configuration (e.g., `["westus2-az1"]`).
Empty array when `mode` is `logical`.

subscriptionZoneMappings.description:
Per-subscription zone resolution results. Each entry maps a subscription
to the logical zone resolved from the requested physical zone.
Empty when `mode` is `logical`.

zoneMappings.description: The physical-to-logical zone mappings for this subscription.

logicalZone.description:
The logical availability zone resolved for this subscription
(e.g., `"1"`, `"2"`, `"3"`).

id.description: String of the fully qualified resource ID.

properties.description: The properties of the experiment execution details.

startedAt.description: String that represents the start date time.

stoppedAt.description: String that represents the stop date time.

provisioningState.description: Resource provisioning state. Not currently in use for executions.

failureReason.description: The reason why the execution failed.

lastActionAt.description: String that represents the last action date time.

runInformation.description: The information of the experiment run.

steps.description: The steps of the experiment run.

status.description: The value of the status of the step.

branchName.description: The name of the branch status.

branchId.description: The id of the branch status.

actionName.description: The name of the action status.

actionId.description: The id of the action status.

startTime.description: String that represents the start time of the action.

endTime.description: String that represents the end time of the action.

targetFailedTime.description: String that represents the failed date time.

targetCompletedTime.description: String that represents the completed date time.

whatIf.description: Optional value that indicates whether to run a "dry run" of fixing resource permissions.
